title: After the Takarazuka Kinen: Watch Out World!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The reporter with the round glasses, who was
watching quietly, draws courage from the scene
and vows to work harder.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meanwhile, thrilled with her win and ready to
take on some more powerhouses,
Matikanetannhauser immediately suggests
making the Japan Cup her next goal.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She may not be confident in her ability to win,
but she wants to give it a try... And so our days
preparing for the Japan Cup begin!
